serializableData.oldContent: High volatility games pay out less often on average but the chance to hit big wins in a short time span is higher
WILD symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4.
The MONEY RESPIN feature starts after all win combinations for the lines are paid.

During the MONEY RESPIN feature, MONEY symbols take a random value from a predefined set, the possible values are 0.2x, 0.4x, 0.6x, 1x, 1.2x, 1.4x, 2x, 2.4x, 3x, 4x, 5x, 6x, 8x, 10x, 12x, 20x, 40x, 50x, 60x, 80x, 100x total bet.

The maximum win amount is limited to {0}x bet in both base game and respins. If the total win of a RESPIN feature reaches {1}x bet the round immediately ends, win is awarded and all remaining respins are forfeited.
The round ends automatically if all positions on the screen are filled.
All symbols pay from left to right on adjacent reels starting from the leftmost reel.
If one of the matrices is filled with symbols on all 15 positions, a fixed jackpot expressed in multipliers of total bet is awarded as follows:
Filling the matrix marked with MINOR awards a fixed jackpot of 50x total bet.
It appears on all reels only in the base game.
This is the EXTRA SPIN symbol.
Respin round total win in the history contains the whole win of the cycle.
Malfunction voids all pays and plays.
The MONEY RESPIN feature can be instantly triggered from the base game by buying it for 100x current total bet.
This is the DOUBLE MONEY symbol. It counts as 2 MONEY symbols.
This is the WILD symbol and substitutes for all symbols except for MONEY symbol.
All values are expressed as actual wins in coins.
SPACE and ENTER buttons on the keyboard can be used to start and stop the spin.
When winning on multiple paylines, all wins are added to the total win.
Respin round win is awarded to the player after the round completes.
During the round, the game plays on four 3x5 matrices of symbols.
Whenever it hits, one more respin is awarded.

During the base game whenever a full stack of the highest value symbol hits on reel 1 it will copy the stack on one or more additional reels, up to all reels, replacing anything that would hit below those stacks.
The normal symbols fade away and on the four matrices as many money symbols as there were when the feature was triggered are distributed in random positions.
The theoretical RTP of this game is {0}%
WILD symbol does not appear in the MONEY RESPIN feature.
This is the MONEY symbol. It appears on all reels during base game and the MONEY RESPIN feature.
Respin wins are added to the payline win.

The round starts with 8 respins. All MONEY, MULTIPLIER and EXTRA SPIN symbols that hit after each respin remain on the screen until the end of the round. The round continues until respins are finished or all positions on the screen are filled.
Filling the matrix marked with MINI awards a fixed jackpot of 20x total bet.
All wins are multiplied by base bet.
During the RESPIN round only MONEY symbols, MULTIPLIER symbols and EXTRA SPIN symbols are present on the reel strips.
When the MONEY RESPIN feature is completed, the value of all MONEY symbols on the screen are added together, jackpots are added and the game pays the total amount.
The RTP of the game when using "BUY RESPINS" is {0}%
Filling the matrix marked with MAJOR awards a fixed jackpot of 200x total bet.
Hit 6 or more MONEY symbols in the base game to trigger the MONEY RESPIN feature.
Filling the matrix marked with GRAND awards a fixed jackpot of 5000x total bet.
Whenever it hits it reveals a multiplier of 2x, 3x, 5x, 10x or 25x randomly which will be applied to a random MONEY symbol from any filled position on any of the four matrices.
When buying the MONEY RESPIN feature the round will start with a random number of MONEY symbols on the spin that starts the bought round.
Only the highest win is paid per winning combination on the same payline.
THAT’S THE WAY I LIKE IT
OH MY, THAT WIN IS SO BIG!
PRESS TO BEGIN THE GOLD PARTY BONUS
GOLD PARTY BONUS WITH 4 REEL SETS!
MIN TOTAL BET TO BUY FREE SPINS

serializableData._text: 波动性较高的游戏通常较少赔付，但在短时间内赢取大奖的几率更高
WILD符号会出现在第2、3和4转轴上。
MONEY RESPIN 功能会在赔付所有赔付线上的奖金组合后开始。

在MONEY RESPIN功能中，MONEY符号从预定义的集合中
抽取一个随机值，可能的值是0.2倍，0.4倍，0.6倍，1倍，
1.2倍，1.4倍，2倍，2.4倍，3倍，4倍，5倍，6倍，
8倍，10倍，12倍，20倍，40倍，50倍，
60倍，80倍，100倍总赌注。
基本游戏和重新旋转中的最大奖金金额不能超过{0}x赌注。 如果重新旋转功能的总奖金达到{1}x赌注，回合立即结束并派发奖金，所有剩余的重新旋转次数作废。
如果屏幕中的所有位置均已填满，则回合将自动结束。
从最左侧的转轴起临近转轴上所有符号从左向右支付。
如果一个矩阵的所有15个位置均填满了符号，则会奖励以总赌注乘数形式体现的固定累积奖金，如下所示：
填满标有MINOR的矩阵即可获得50x总赌注的固定累积奖金。
它只会在基本游戏中出现在所有转轴上。
历史记录中的重新旋转回合总奖金包含了整个过程中的全部奖励。
系统故障期间所有游戏及赔付无效。
在基本游戏中以100X当前总赌注进行购买即可马上触发现金重新旋转功能。
这是双倍现金符号。它将算作2个现金符号。
这是WILD符号，可替代除现金符号之外的所有其他符号。
所有数值均为实际奖金的硬币数。
键盘上的空格和回车按钮可用于开始和停止旋转。
如果多条支付线上有赢奖，则所有赢奖都将加入到总赢奖中。
重新旋转奖励在回合结束后奖给玩家。
在回合期间，游戏会以四个3x5符号矩阵进行。
无论何时出现该符号， 都会额外奖励一次重新旋转。
在基本游戏中，只要完全堆叠的最大数值符号出现在第1转轴上， 它就会将堆叠复制到一个或多个其他转轴上，甚至复制到所有的转轴上， 从而取代任何会在这些堆叠下方出现的符号。
普通符号都将逐渐消失，在四个矩阵上，与触发功能时一样多的现金符号会分布在随机位置。
现金重新旋转功能期间不会出现WILD符号。
购买现金重新旋转功能
这是现金符号。 在基本游戏和现金重新旋转功能期间， 它会出现在所有转轴上。
重新旋转奖金会添加到赔付线奖金中。
回合会以8次重新旋转开始。每次重新旋转后出现的所有现金、 乘数和额外旋转符号都会保留在屏幕上， 直至回合结束。该回合继续，直至重新旋转结束或者屏幕中所有位置都填满。
填满标有MINI的矩阵即可获得20x总赌注的固定累积奖金。
所有奖金都将乘以基本赌注。
在重新旋转回合期间，轴条上只会出现现金符号、乘数符号和额外旋转符号。
当现金重新旋转功能完成后，屏幕中所有现金符号的数值都会相互累加，然后添加累积奖金，最后游戏将赔付总金额。
使用“购买重新旋转”时的游戏RTP为{0}%
填满标有MAJOR的矩阵即可获得200x总赌注的固定累积奖金。
在基本游戏中出现6个或更多现金符号可触发现金重新旋转功能。
填满标有GRAND的矩阵即可获得5000x总赌注的固定累积奖金。
只要出现该符号，即会随机显示乘数2x、 3x、5x、10x或25x， 它们会适用于四个矩阵中任何已填满位置的随机现金符号。
如果购买重新旋转功能，回合将以随机数量的现金符号进行，具体取决于开始所购买回合的旋转。
同一条赔付线上每个赢奖组合只会赔付最高奖金。
您让这事情看起来很简单
按下开始黄金派对奖金
包含4组转轴的黄金派对奖励！
購買重新旋轉的最小總賭注
